comment.body:
Hi Alma, greetings from Australia! Thank you for answering my question on the market correction and gold. I would love just a bit of clarification. I think you're brain is so much faster and more efficient that sometimes what's obvious and can be said in few words by you takes a bit more for me/us! 
In any case, when you talked about the targets for gold particularly. 

1)Did you mean to say your targets from back in June/july (ai bubble post) are not valid anymore since gold has moved so substantially? Or they are still valid?
2) you refer to rangebound and targets rather than corrections. Is this to mean that the low target /correction bottom level you indicate is just to say that the 'rangebounding' will happen between that low and where we are?

I hope you can clarify that a bit. It's a matter of better  understanding what you refer to with target, correction, ranges etc.

Again, thank you so much for taking the time. You are my favourite professor!

comment.body: if gamma scalping doesn't offset the theta bleed, some desk can calendarizing to neutralize theta (without taking vega risk! and lowering the daily gamma exposure significantly) or verticals/ratios as well if the skew risk allows it... depends on the book... .. EOD also charm hedging

comment.body: i mean "without taking vega risk", it will add vega, but a) the book where shorter vega before, and this leg offsets short vega... also vol exposure can be hedged through vol products, swaps, futs etc. really depends on the book itself, and the timeframes of the exposures. but it can be offset/neutralized
